profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for Fast-hosted data services.

service.name: Apple App Store Scraper
service.tagline: Search Apple App Store listings and app metadata through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: Apple App Store Scraper exposes an Apify-backed app-store workflow through the marketplace for keyword discovery, chart monitoring, pricing research, and metadata extraction across Apple App Store listings.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the Apple App Store Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Provide a search term and optional country, category, or chart filters.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Search Apps
endpoints.description: Search Apple App Store listings by keyword, country, category, or chart and return structured app metadata.
endpoints.usageNotes: Use this for iOS app discovery, chart monitoring, and metadata enrichment.
